description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a global before_script that runs `apt-get update --yes`, `apt-get upgrade --yes`, installs Bundler with `gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc`, and installs project gems using `bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --path ./vendor/bundle`. Add an `rspec` job (default test stage) that executes `bundle exec rspec`. Assign the job to runners tagged `shared`.
